narrative:
Precinct Harrison East & New Madison (precinct in Darke County) has 990 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.5 percentage points.
